description: Composition100 % cotton dark brown sleeveless top with a round neck, softly ribbed around the neckline and armpits, and with an embroidered brand name close to the hem on the leftFittingRegularWash care Gentle machine wash in cool water at 30 C Use mild detergent Do not scrub Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Do not wring Do not dry in direct sunlight Cool iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Wash, dry and iron inside out Do not dry clean Sporty and chic, this dark brown top from s.oliver is perfect for those warm summer days. Feel light and breezy in this pure cotton top all day long. Team it with jeans or shorts and look absolutely cool.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.8", Chest-33"
